entries.title: Autonomous AI Intrusions Are Here: Lessons from the Hugging Face Compromise
entries.summary: Hugging Face disclosed an intrusion that, according to them, was driven end to end by an autonomous AI agent system. Along similar lines, Sysdig recently published a blog on JADEPUFFER , which it assesses to be an agent-driven ransomware capable of adapting in real time. The report does not identify the victim or fully explain how Sysdig obtained visibility into the operation. The Hugging Face dis

entries.title: Reverse-engineering is cheap now
entries.summary: I keep hearing anecdotes from people who used coding agents to reverse-engineer and automate devices in their homes. I think this is an interesting illustration of the impact of the reduced cost of writing code. Prior to agents, it was entirely possible to reverse-engineer home devices. The problem was the ROI - was it really worth all of that effort? More importantly, any experienced programmer k
